name: IShowSpeed
description:
'''Darren Jason Watkins Jr.''' (born January 21, 2005), better known as '''IShowSpeed''' or simply '''Speed''', is an American [[influencer|influencer,]] musician and [[online streamer]]. He is known for his dramatic and energetic behavior he displays during his variety [[live streams]], including [[Lifecasting (video stream)|in-real-life]] streams conducted in various worldwide locations. Watkins has been viewed as a cultural ambassador as he visits countries often to showcase their cultures and inventions to both domestic and international audiences.

Watkins was born in [[Cincinnati]], Ohio. Registering his [[YouTube]] channel in 2016, he first posted gaming content. Watkins started gaining attention in 2021 due to his violent verbal and physical reactions when gaming. In 2022, he began shifting focus towards general entertainment, including [[association football|soccer]]-related content, becoming an avid supporter of [[Cristiano Ronaldo]], commonly revolving his content around his support for the player.

Watkins has also pursued a [[Hip-hop|rapping]] career. He signed with [[Warner Records]] to release his 2022 single "[[World Cup (song)|World Cup]]", which charted in several countries. He later followed it up with the 2026 single "[[World Cup (Champions)|Champions]]", which was featured on the [[FIFA World Cup 2026 Official Album]]. He was named Breakout Streamer of the Year at the [[12th Streamy Awards]] in 2022, and twice won Streamer of the Year at the [[2024 Streamer Awards]] and [[2025 Streamer Awards]]. Watkins is regarded as one of the most popular entertainers and Internet personalities in the world.
